title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates building AI agents with the Strands Agents SDK, showing the agent loop pattern: model reasoning, tool selection, execution, and iteration. The video covers four agent examples ranging from single-tool agents to multi-agent orchestrators.
